title: Premium UI, RTL and Mobile Layout
delivery: Mobile toolbar preserves 42px controls and scrolls horizontally rather than clipping.
Settings uses safe-area bottom-sheet geometry on touch screens and contained side workspace on desktop.
Six distinct full interface skins with explicit Light/Dark selection.
RTL/LTR label, select, toggle and summary-arrow geometry stays fixed and readable.
FPS, Online and CAM remain transparent overlays.
